description_long: This object consists of two adjacent wall-mounted units with a dark, wood-textured finish. The left unit features a double electrical outlet with circular sockets and metallic contacts, framed by a rectangular border. The right unit is a dual rocker switch panel, also rectangular, with two distinct switch segments and subtle horizontal grooves. Both units have a sleek, modern appearance, with the outlet and switch faces slightly recessed within their frames. The materials suggest a combination of plastic or composite for the main body, with metallic elements for the contacts. The overall design is compact and intended for flush mounting on a vertical surface.
description: A modern, wall-mounted double electrical outlet and dual rocker switch panel with a dark wood-textured finish and metallic contacts.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the thinness and flush-mount design of the outlet and switch units.
description_view_1: A front view displaying the double circular electrical outlets on the left and the dual rocker switches on the right, both with a dark wood finish.
description_view_2: A side profile from the opposite direction, again highlighting the slim, wall-mounted nature of the units.
description_view_3: A top-down view showing the rectangular layout and separation between the outlet and switch panels.
attribute_control_panel_layout: No traditional control panel; features two rocker switches on the right unit and two circular outlet sockets on the left unit, each with metallic contacts.
